overrides.expect: \varepsilon_ {2} (q, \omega) = \left\{ \begin{array}{l l} \frac {2 m ^ {2} e ^ {2}}{\hbar^ {3}} \frac {\omega}{q ^ {3}} & \text {if q <   2k_{F} and 0\leq(2m / \hbar)\omega\leq 2qk_{F} - q^{2}} \\ \frac {m e ^ {2}}{\hbar^ {2}} \frac {1}{q ^ {3}} \left[ k _ {\mathrm{F}} ^ {2} - \left(\frac {q}{2} - \frac {m}{\hbar} \frac {\omega}{q}\right) ^ {2} \right] & \text {if 2qk_{F} -q^{2} \leq(2m / \hbar)\omega\leq 2qk_{F} + q^{2}} \\ 0 & \text {in the other cases} \end{array} \right.\tag{A10}
overrides.new: \varepsilon_ {2} (q, \omega) = \left\{ \begin{array}{l l} \frac {2 m ^ {2} e ^ {2}}{\hbar^ {3}} \frac {\omega}{q ^ {3}} & \text {if } q < 2k_{F} \text { and } 0\leq(2m / \hbar)\omega\leq 2qk_{F} - q^{2} \\ \frac {m e ^ {2}}{\hbar^ {2}} \frac {1}{q ^ {3}} \left[ k _ {\mathrm{F}} ^ {2} - \left(\frac {q}{2} - \frac {m}{\hbar} \frac {\omega}{q}\right) ^ {2} \right] & \text {if } 2qk_{F} -q^{2} \leq(2m / \hbar)\omega\leq 2qk_{F} + q^{2} \\ 0 & \text {in the other cases} \end{array} \right.\tag{A10}

overrides.expect: \begin{array}{l} \langle f | H _ {\text { indirect }} | i \rangle = \frac {1}{2} \langle f | H _ {1} S - S H _ {1} | i \rangle = \frac {1}{2} \sum_ {\alpha} [ \langle f | H _ {1} | \alpha \rangle \langle \alpha | S | i \rangle - \langle f | S | \alpha \rangle \langle \alpha | H _ {1} | i \rangle ] \\ = \frac {1}{2} \sum_ {\alpha} \langle f | H _ {1} | \alpha \rangle \langle \alpha | H _ {1} | i \rangle \left[ \frac {1}{E _ {i} - E _ {\alpha}} + \frac {1}{E _ {f} - E _ {\alpha}} \right]. \end{array} \tag {A}\tag{A4}
overrides.new: \begin{array}{l} \langle f | H _ {\text { indirect }} | i \rangle = \frac {1}{2} \langle f | H _ {1} S - S H _ {1} | i \rangle = \frac {1}{2} \sum_ {\alpha} [ \langle f | H _ {1} | \alpha \rangle \langle \alpha | S | i \rangle - \langle f | S | \alpha \rangle \langle \alpha | H _ {1} | i \rangle ] \\ = \frac {1}{2} \sum_ {\alpha} \langle f | H _ {1} | \alpha \rangle \langle \alpha | H _ {1} | i \rangle \left[ \frac {1}{E _ {i} - E _ {\alpha}} + \frac {1}{E _ {f} - E _ {\alpha}} \right]. \end{array} \tag{A4}
